tools.name: minerva_drive_status
tools.description: Return the current connection and readiness status of the Drive plugin. Never fails — returns {ready, connected, device, project_count}.

tools.name: minerva_drive_list
tools.description: List all Drive projects and their sync status (synced / local_ahead / cloud_ahead / conflict / local_only / cloud_only).

tools.name: minerva_drive_sync
tools.description: Run a sync pass: push local changes, pull cloud changes, and record conflicts. Returns the pushed and pulled name lists, conflicts, and any errors.

tools.name: minerva_drive_add
tools.description: Register a local file path to be synced.

path.description: Absolute local file path to sync.

tools.name: minerva_drive_remove
tools.description: Stop syncing a local file path (cloud copies are kept).

path.description: Local file path to stop syncing.
